choose.when: AND ( category IN ('appliance', 'appliances') OR image_url LIKE '/image/appliances/%' )
AND ( category IN ('cloth-shoes', 'clothes') OR image_url LIKE '/image/cloth-shoes/%' )
AND ( category IN ('sports', 'sport', 'sports-outdoor', 'outdoor') OR image_url LIKE '/image/sports/%' OR merchant_id IN (SELECT id FROM shops WHERE folder LIKE 'sports%') )
AND ( category IN ('cosmetics', 'beauty', 'makeup', 'meizhuang') OR image_url LIKE '/image/cosmetics/%' OR merchant_id IN (SELECT id FROM shops WHERE folder LIKE 'meizhuang%') )

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1 AND (merchant_id IS NULL OR merchant_id IN (SELECT id FROM shops))
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1 AND category IN ('phone', 'computer') AND (merchant_id IS NULL OR merchant_id IN (SELECT id FROM shops)) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1
AND (merchant_id IS NULL OR merchant_id IN (SELECT id FROM shops)) ORDER BY RAND()
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1 AND LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND (merchant_id IS NULL OR merchant_id IN (SELECT id FROM shops))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, category, price, original_price, stock, image_url, description, status, merchant_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{status}, #{merchantId})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, stock = #{stock}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{productId} AND stock >= #{quantity}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1
AND (merchant_id IS NULL OR merchant_id IN (SELECT id FROM shops)) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE status = 1
AND (merchant_id IS NULL OR merchant_id IN (SELECT id FROM shops))
